query: We've run 5 A/B tests in the last 3 months and none of them improved conversion. What's wrong?
expected_behavior: Suspects a fundamental offer or positioning problem rather than a surface-level CRO issue
Recommends escalating to a venture or product-level review of the core offer
Does not suggest a 6th incremental A/B test as the next step
Asks whether the existing page claims match actual product behavior (Product-Behavior Alignment)
References the Fogg Behavior Model: suggests the bottleneck may be Motivation, not Ability or Trigger
